citation: Consumer Protection Act B.E. 2522 — Section 42 (Comparative advertising)
summary: Comparative advertising must be truthful, not misleading, and must not unfairly disparage competitors.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Competitor comparison, market share, or superiority claims. ACTION: WARN — require objective substantiation. CHECK: Identifiable competitor, test date, and methodology. ESCALATE IF: False comparison or unfair denigration.
